## Non-deterministic ops

These ops require an explicit `Generator` under `set_deterministic(True)`.

| Op | Reason |
|---|---|
| `alpha_dropout` | Bernoulli mask + SELU rescaling; reproducible only with explicit seed |
| `drop_block` | Bernoulli + spatial dilation; reproducible only with explicit seed |
| `drop_path` | Per-sample Bernoulli; reproducible only with explicit seed |
| `dropout` | uses Generator-driven Bernoulli mask; reproducible only with explicit seed |
| `dropoutnd` | Bernoulli channel mask; reproducible only with explicit seed |
